brand-story-image.query: Velmora began with a single question: why should choosing a piece of jewelry feel temporary? We work with a small atelier to plate every piece in 18K gold over a hypoallergenic core, then finish it by hand — so the warmth you fall in love with on day one is still there on day five hundred. Quiet luxury, made to be lived in. Designed to outlast the season. Our Story

We work with a small atelier to plate every piece in 18K gold over a hypoallergenic core, then finish it by hand — so the warmth you fall in love with on day one is still there on day five hundred.
